The '''Anchorhead Base''' or '''Mos Eisley Base''' was a minor training base of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], dug into the [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], with a small base of operations located in the lower basement level of the small cafe in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]].

==History==
The only known Rebel military presence on Tatooine, it served as a staging point for Rebels tasked with the purchase of black market weapons from various shady contacts in nearby spaceports such as [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].
[[File:AnchorheadBaseGoBoom.jpg|thumb|left|The destruction of Anchorhead Base.]]
The base trained rookie pilots in the treacherous walls of the canyon with the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]]. It was here where [[Rookie One]] flew his first training session for the Rebel Alliance.

It was also the base from which the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] against [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] was launched before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but the Rebels were tracked down and the base was destroyed by three [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].
